message:
test(observability): add serialization and auditable-field tests for connection pool validator

New tests for the connection pool validation report:

- test_validation_report_serializes_auditable_fields: verifies the full
  JSON shape of a Critical-health validation report including health
  status, summary counters (configured_pool_size, concurrent_writers),
  recommendation (recommended_pool_size), and per-finding structure
  (pattern, severity, confidence_score, evidence array with MVCC-specific
  guidance text)
- test_best_practices_iter_returns_all_entries_with_stable_ids: verifies
  best practices iterator completeness and ID stability
- lib.rs: re-export connection_pool module for downstream test access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
